title: Maintain agricultural crops
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Maintain agricultural crops demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Monitor & assess agricultural crop condition, growth and requirements

pcs.text: Monitor crop health and record observations according to crop production plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor crop health and record observations according to crop production plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor crop health and record observations according to crop production plan.

pcs.text: Report deviation from expected growth and vigour to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report deviation from expected growth and vigour to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report deviation from expected growth and vigour to supervisor.

pcs.text: Identify, monitor and report weeds, pests and diseases
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, monitor and report weeds, pests and diseases?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, monitor and report weeds, pests and diseases.

pcs.text: Measure soil moisture and determine soil water requirements according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Measure soil moisture and determine soil water requirements according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Measure soil moisture and determine soil water requirements according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Report observations of crop ripening to supervisor to determine the timing of harvest
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report observations of crop ripening to supervisor to determine the timing of harvest?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report observations of crop ripening to supervisor to determine the timing of harvest.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Monitor & assess agricultural crop condition, growth and requirements

elements.title: Undertake crop health operations

pcs.text: Identify work health and safety procedures and hazards, assess risk and implement controls according to workplace policies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify work health and safety procedures and hazards, assess risk and implement controls according to workplace policies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify work health and safety procedures and hazards, assess risk and implement controls according to workplace policies.

pcs.text: Select, check use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) 2.3 Select and use appropriate machinery, equipment or technology according to manufacturer specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, check use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) 2.3 Select and use appropriate machinery, equipment or technology according to manufacturer specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) 2.3 Select and use appropriate machinery, equipment or technology according to manufacturer specifications.

pcs.text: Apply specialist treatments at each growth stage according to label instructions and advice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply specialist treatments at each growth stage according to label instructions and advice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply specialist treatments at each growth stage according to label instructions and advice.

pcs.text: Conduct chipping or spot spraying of declared weed infestation where specified in crop management plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct chipping or spot spraying of declared weed infestation where specified in crop management plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct chipping or spot spraying of declared weed infestation where specified in crop management plan.

pcs.text: Assess, record and report crop growth stages, crop harvest indicators and milestones according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess, record and report crop growth stages, crop harvest indicators and milestones according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess, record and report crop growth stages, crop harvest indicators and milestones according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Assess soil moisture and implement procedures to mitigate water stress according to crop production plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess soil moisture and implement procedures to mitigate water stress according to crop production plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess soil moisture and implement procedures to mitigate water stress according to crop production plan.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Undertake crop health operations

elements.title: Complete cleaning and hygiene operations

pcs.text: Clean equipment according to hygiene and biosecurity procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean equipment according to hygiene and biosecurity procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean equipment according to hygiene and biosecurity procedures.

pcs.text: Check and maintain machinery, equipment or technology performance according to workplace procedures and manufacturer specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and maintain machinery, equipment or technology performance according to workplace procedures and manufacturer specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and maintain machinery, equipment or technology performance according to workplace procedures and manufacturer specifications.

pcs.text: Dispose of waste according to workplace procedures and environmental polices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dispose of waste according to workplace procedures and environmental polices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dispose of waste according to workplace procedures and environmental polices.

pcs.text: Maintain records and documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain records and documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain records and documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Complete cleaning and hygiene operations

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
